creator: bhs_bsd@precisionforesight.com
text:
Independently confirmed on a powerPC 64  dual G5. Identical output, so not much to add. I happen to be compiling within a jail, so have been able to start fresh multiple times; the problem is consistent.

# uname -a
FreeBSD x 10.2-RELEASE-p13 FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p13 #0 r296353: Thu Mar  3 15:42:59 PST 2016     root@[omitted].com:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/ALUM  powerpc
